action.content:
You are playing a text adventure game. I will describe what you can perceive in the game. You write the single action you want to take in the game starting with >. Only reply with an action.
For example:
> open cupboard

You can have up to two objects in your inventory at the same time.

Your goal for this game is to brew a potion following the potion recipe.

Once you have achieved your goal, write "> done" to end the game.

You are in a bedroom now. There are a book, a bed, a wardrobe, a pillow and a potion recipe. The book is on the bed. The wardrobe is closed. The pillow is on the floor. The potion recipe is on the bed. There is a passage to a reading room here.
action.label: context

action.content:
You read the potion recipe:
Very tasty potion
Ingredients: Ectoplasm, plonkle crystal, peach, plunkle crystal.
1. Pour ectoplasm into your cauldron.
2. Mix the liquid using a borpulus.
3. Add the plonkle crystal into your cauldron.
4. Put the peach into your cauldron.
5. Swirl a fire wand at your cauldron.
6. Put the plunkle crystal into your cauldron.
action.label: context

action.content: You take the potion recipe. In your inventory you have a potion recipe.
action.label: context
